nation: Mississaugas of Scugog Island First Nation
economic_notes: Noozhoo Nokiiyan LP acquired 51% of Sky Canoe Inc. on August 18, 2023. Subsequent to year end, NNLP purchased additional shares in Voyageur Services Limited resulting in a majority stake ($185,500). First Nation committed to purchasing 3 members houses ($1,500,000) and building 2 modular homes ($1,029,000). Williams Treaty Community Legacy Trust income of $3,770,285. Large investment portfolio of $117,987,634 managed through BMO Harris Private Banking and Lighthouse Private Wealth.
notes: Large consolidated entity with 8 fully consolidated subsidiaries including Noozhoo Nokiiyan GP Inc., Noozhoo Nokiiyan LP, MSIFN (Island Road) Holdings Inc., 2810351 Ontario Inc., 10000225546 Ontario Ltd., 2687350 Ontario Ltd., Minogi Corporation, and Sky Canoe Inc. (proportionate consolidation at 51% from Aug 18, 2023). Significant investment portfolio of ~$118M. FNFA promissory note of $27.15M at 4.28% due 2034 secured by OLG revenue share. Accumulated remeasurement gains of $5,291,795 not included in accumulated operating surplus. OSR is very high due to commercial operations and investment income. No schedule of remuneration found in extracted text. The segment disclosure table appears truncated at the end. Prior accumulated surplus uses Note 15 total of $183,419,345.
